title: eliokarmos dubius
intro: Eliokarmos dubius, also known as the "sensitive plant" or "touch-me-not," is a species of flowering plant in the pea family Fabaceae. This plant is native to tropical Africa and has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of eliokarmos dubius include reducing inflammation and improving cardiovascular health, as well as its potential to lower blood pressure and cholesterol levels. Herbal preparations of eliokarmos dubius can be found in the form of teas, tinctures, and capsules, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety for human consumption.
